ddls:
CREATE TABLE "travel_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each travel data record */,
  "measure" TEXT /* Description of the measure (e.g., Mode of travel to school) */,
  "time_period_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the time period of the data */,
  "ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ethnicity of the data */,
  "main_mode_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the main mode of transport */,
  "value" REAL /* Percentage value of the measure */,
  "weighted_sample_trips" INTEGER /* Weighted sample trips */,
  "unweighted_sample_trips" INTEGER /* Unweighted sample trips */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group of the data */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school of the data */,
  "distance" REAL /* Average distance traveled to school */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Typical start time of the trip */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Typical end time of the trip */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Average duration of the trip */,
  "data_version" INTEGER /* Version of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_travel_data_main_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("main_mode_id") REFERENCES modes_of_transport ("mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_travel_data_ethnicity_id FOREIGN KEY ("ethnicity_id") REFERENCES ethnicities ("ethnicity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_travel_data_time_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_period_id") REFERENCES time_periods ("time_period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_periods" (
  "time_period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time period */,
  "time_period" TEXT /* Time period (e.g., 2002-2006) */,
  "time_type" TEXT /* Type of time period (e.g., 5-year rolling average) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the time period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the time period */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the time period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ethnicities" (
  "ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ethnicity */,
  "ethnicity_name" TEXT /* Name of the ethnicity (e.g., All ethnic groups) */,
  "ethnicity_type" TEXT /* Type of ethnicity classification (e.g., National Travel Survey broad ethnicity classification) */,
  "parent_ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent ethnicity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the ethnicity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ethnicity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ethnicities_parent_ethnicity_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_ethnicity_id") REFERENCES ethnicities ("ethnicity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modes_of_transport" (
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mode of transport */,
  "mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the mode of transport (e.g., Bicycle, Car / Van) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the mode of transport */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the icon representing the mode of transport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., transport planner, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the travel data record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES travel_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., National Travel Survey) */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., survey, census) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update timestamp of the data source */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_source_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the travel data record */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the mapping */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_mapping_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES travel_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_mapping_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)
